proposed: 轻量化无人机平台的小目标检测受限于算力与能耗，现有方法（如AD-Det的ASOE与DCC）虽在精度上有显著提升，但其计算开销与实时性能在嵌入式硬件上的适配性未经验证。需设计一项可独立开关的计算优化干预，以在不损害检测精度的前提下，降低推理时的计算成本。

Under 现有小目标检测方法（如AD-Det）在UAV图像上的精度优势已被验证，但其实时性能与能耗指标在轻量化平台上未经评估。, 在特征提取网络（如AD-Det的骨干网络）与检测头之间插入DFS模块，该模块在推理阶段以低成本的方式（如基于阈值的掩码生成）选择性保留高信息量区域，并对低响应区域进行稀疏化处理。DFS模块的开关状态可由用户通过配置文件或运行时参数控制。 should 预期在保持检测精度（AP）基本不变的前提下，推理时的计算成本（如FLOPs）降低15–25%，推理延迟（latency）缩短10–20%，能耗（energy consumption）降低12–18%。 because DFS通过计算特征图的响应强度分布，动态生成二进制掩码，仅保留高响应区域用于后续处理。该机制利用了小目标在特征图中通常表现为局部高响应的特性，通过稀疏化减少冗余计算，从而降低推理时的计算成本。 addresses DFS模块依赖于输入图像的特征响应分布，在极端光照变化（如强逆光或夜间场景）下可能导致特征稀疏化过度，进而影响小目标的检测召回率。, while 设置响应强度阈值的动态调节机制，确保在任何场景下保留的特征区域面积不低于原始特征图的60%，以避免因稀疏化过度导致的精度下降。同时，在DFS模块前后添加特征恢复机制，确保稀疏化处理不会破坏特征的空间连续性。.

verified: AD-Det achieves a 37.5% Average Precision (AP) on the VisDrone dataset, surpassing existing competitive alternatives by at least 3.1%.
AD-Det integrates Adaptive Small Object Enhancement (ASOE) and Dynamic Class-balanced Copy-paste (DCC) to address scale variation and class imbalance in UAV images.
The Swin Transformer-based neck with CenterNet improves small object detection performance by using smaller window sizes (e.g., default 2) for mAP gains.
The Attention-Points Network enhances classification and regression tasks for small oriented objects in aerial images using Guided-Attention Loss (GALoss) and Box-Points Loss (BPLoss).
The VisDrone dataset is explicitly named in the verified paper 'AD-Det: Boosting Object Detection in UAV Images with Focused Small Objects and Balanced Tail Classes'.
TJU-DHD is a diverse high-resolution dataset with 115,354 images and 709,330 labeled objects, designed to promote research on object detection in challenging scenarios.

hypothesis.condition: 现有小目标检测方法（如AD-Det）在UAV图像上的精度优势已被验证，但其实时性能与能耗指标在轻量化平台上未经评估。
hypothesis.guardrail: 设置响应强度阈值的动态调节机制，确保在任何场景下保留的特征区域面积不低于原始特征图的60%，以避免因稀疏化过度导致的精度下降。同时，在DFS模块前后添加特征恢复机制，确保稀疏化处理不会破坏特征的空间连续性。
hypothesis.intervention: 在特征提取网络（如AD-Det的骨干网络）与检测头之间插入DFS模块，该模块在推理阶段以低成本的方式（如基于阈值的掩码生成）选择性保留高信息量区域，并对低响应区域进行稀疏化处理。DFS模块的开关状态可由用户通过配置文件或运行时参数控制。
hypothesis.limitation: DFS模块依赖于输入图像的特征响应分布，在极端光照变化（如强逆光或夜间场景）下可能导致特征稀疏化过度，进而影响小目标的检测召回率。
hypothesis.mechanism: DFS通过计算特征图的响应强度分布，动态生成二进制掩码，仅保留高响应区域用于后续处理。该机制利用了小目标在特征图中通常表现为局部高响应的特性，通过稀疏化减少冗余计算，从而降低推理时的计算成本。
hypothesis.target_metric: 预期在保持检测精度（AP）基本不变的前提下，推理时的计算成本（如FLOPs）降低15–25%，推理延迟（latency）缩短10–20%，能耗（energy consumption）降低12–18%。

modules.compute_cost: DFS模块本身的计算成本极低（约占总推理成本的1–3%），主要开销在于特征响应强度的计算与掩码生成。
modules.failure_mode: 1) 在特征响应分布极不均匀的场景下，DFS可能过度稀疏化，导致小目标信息丢失，进而降低召回率；2) 动态阈值调节机制失效，导致稀疏化阈值固定过高或过低，影响精度或计算效率。
modules.input_semantics: 输入为特征提取网络输出的特征图（形状为[B, C, H, W]），其中B为批次大小，C为通道数，H和W为空间尺寸。
modules.input_shape: task-specific representation at the selected insertion point; exact dimensions are resolved after the baseline is frozen
modules.optimization_interaction: verify non-zero finite gradients in the module and connected baseline path; train the candidate module and matched baseline parameters under the same budget; keep baseline loss scaling unchanged unless a documented pilot failure requires repair; inherit baseline task losses and weights for the first pilot
modules.original_role: 特征提取网络的中间层（无显式稀疏化机制）
modules.output_semantics: 输出为稀疏化后的特征图（形状与输入相同），但低响应区域已被稀疏化处理，仅保留高信息量区域用于后续检测头处理。
modules.output_shape: representation contract required by the downstream baseline stage
modules.proposed_role: 在特征提取与检测头之间插入的可选稀疏化模块，用于动态降低推理时的计算成本

proposed: Dermatoscopy and clinical close-up imaging provide complementary diagnostic cues, with dermatoscopy improving sensitivity for malignant lesions but lowering specificity for nevi. Multimodal fusion (e.g., 3D total body photography + clinical data) achieves high accuracy and AUC, outperforming unimodal approaches. However, class imbalance and false positives remain challenges in real-world deployment, particularly for underrepresented lesion types or populations.

verified: Dermatoscopy alone shows higher sensitivity (85.0%) but lower specificity (66.8%) for skin lesion diagnosis compared to clinical close-up images (sensitivity 74.2%, specificity 71.9%).

Adding either dermatoscopy or clinical close-up imaging increases the odds of a correct diagnosis, with dermatoscopy raising the odds by 52% (OR = 1.52; 95% CI: 1.36–1.70; P < .001) and clinical close-ups by 40% (OR = 1.40; 95% CI: 1.20–1.61; P < .001).
A deep convolutional neural network ensemble method achieved competitive performance on the ISIC 2018 challenge dataset for skin lesion classification.
Including a dedicated ‘background’ class (images of clear skin) in training datasets improves model robustness and reduces false positives in skin lesion detection.

Multimodal AI frameworks integrating 3D total body photography (3D TBP) with clinical data achieve high diagnostic accuracy (e.g., 87.1% for nevus) and AUC values exceeding 0.95 for multiple lesion types.
Explainable AI methods such as SHAP and Class Activation Maps (CAM) are used to enhance interpretability of skin lesion classification models.
The YOLOv9c model achieved a mAP@50 of 72.5% and a Recall of 71.6% across 10 lesion classes in a curated dataset including background images.

hypothesis.condition: Baseline models (e.g., YOLOv9c, CNN ensembles) are already trained and evaluated on public datasets (e.g., ISIC archives) with reported metrics (mAP, recall, AUC).
hypothesis.guardrail: Calibration module must not degrade performance on malignant lesions (e.g., sensitivity < 80% for melanoma) or increase false negatives for high-risk classes. Stop if calibration worsens AUC for any lesion type by > 2%.
hypothesis.intervention: Add a switchable calibration module that applies lesion-type-specific temperature scaling to the base model's logits. The module is trained on a held-out validation set (e.g., 20% of ISIC 2018) and applied only during inference, ensuring no change to the base model's weights or training pipeline.
hypothesis.limitation: Calibration may reduce performance on rare lesion types due to limited validation samples; requires careful tuning to avoid overfitting to specific datasets.

Mechanism: Post-hoc calibration adjusts confidence scores using a lesion-type-specific temperature scaling derived from SHAP-weighted validation samples, reducing overconfidence without retraining the base model.
hypothesis.target_metric: Expected reduction in false positive rate for nevi by 15–25% while maintaining or slightly improving sensitivity for malignant lesions (e.g., melanoma, BCC). Primary metric: F1-score for nevi; secondary metric: sensitivity for malignant lesions.

modules.output_semantics: Output: Calibrated confidence scores per lesion type, ensuring reduced overconfidence for nevi and maintained or improved sensitivity for malignant lesions. Output is a tensor of adjusted probabilities matching the input logits' shape.

Under 现有方法在NEU-DET与GC10-DET数据集上已实现基线性能，但小目标检测精度（mAP50:95）仍有提升空间。, 在YOLO11s骨干网络的P3、P4、P5特征层中插入MSFAM模块，替换原有的上采样与特征融合机制（如FSPPF）。该干预仅涉及特征融合层的替换，无需修改骨干网络或检测头，可独立开关。 should 预期在NEU-DET与GC10-DET数据集上，mAP@0.5提升2.0–3.5%，mAP50:95提升4.0–6.0%，同时保持推理延迟增加<15%（相对于YOLO11s基线）。 because MSFAM通过分层自适应注意力机制动态聚合多尺度特征，并引入可变形卷积增强小目标边界感知。具体包括：(1) 多尺度特征分组与自适应权重分配；(2) 可变形卷积增强局部特征提取；(3) 轻量级注意力门控机制优化特征融合。该机制独立于骨干网络，可与现有YOLO或Transformer架构兼容。 addresses MSFAM的有效性依赖于多尺度特征的充分表达，在极端小目标（<10像素）或严重遮挡场景下可能受限。此外，模块参数开销（约0.8M）需在实时性与精度间进行权衡。, while 为避免过拟合，MSFAM模块需在训练时采用DropPath（p=0.2）与特征归一化（L2）约束。此外，需监控小目标召回率（IoU<0.3）的变化，若下降>5%，则回滚至基线配置。.

verified: FD-YOLO11 achieves 4.6% and 4.0% mAP@0.5 improvements over YOLO11s on NEU-DET and GC10-DET datasets while maintaining inference speed comparable to YOLO11s.
YOLO-GH improves mAP50 by 5.5% over the base YOLO11 model on the NEU-DET dataset, with reduced parameters (2.52M) and computational cost (6.1 GFLOPs).

An improved RT-DETR-based model achieves a Mean Average Precision of 77.43% on NEU-DET without relying on a larger backbone network, outperforming mainstream models like YOLOv5l, YOLOv8I, and YOLOv11I.
MDT-Net achieves 82.7% mAP50 on NEU-DET and significantly outperforms other detectors in small object detection (mAP50:95 of 0.55), with faster training convergence.
An improved Faster RCNN with PSO-Gabor enhancement achieves 99.78% classification accuracy for steel plate surface defects and a mAP improvement of 0.14 while maintaining 35 FPS.
The NEU-DET dataset is explicitly used for evaluation in multiple steel surface defect detection studies, including FD-YOLO11, YOLO-GH, RT-DETR-based models, and MDT-Net.
The GC10-DET dataset is explicitly used for evaluation in the FD-YOLO11 study, demonstrating cross-dataset applicability of the proposed model.

hypothesis.intervention: 在YOLO11s骨干网络的P3、P4、P5特征层中插入MSFAM模块，替换原有的上采样与特征融合机制（如FSPPF）。该干预仅涉及特征融合层的替换，无需修改骨干网络或检测头，可独立开关。
hypothesis.limitation: MSFAM的有效性依赖于多尺度特征的充分表达，在极端小目标（<10像素）或严重遮挡场景下可能受限。此外，模块参数开销（约0.8M）需在实时性与精度间进行权衡。
hypothesis.mechanism: MSFAM通过分层自适应注意力机制动态聚合多尺度特征，并引入可变形卷积增强小目标边界感知。具体包括：(1) 多尺度特征分组与自适应权重分配；(2) 可变形卷积增强局部特征提取；(3) 轻量级注意力门控机制优化特征融合。该机制独立于骨干网络，可与现有YOLO或Transformer架构兼容。
hypothesis.target_metric: 预期在NEU-DET与GC10-DET数据集上，mAP@0.5提升2.0–3.5%，mAP50:95提升4.0–6.0%，同时保持推理延迟增加<15%（相对于YOLO11s基线）。

modules.compute_cost: 参数量约0.8M，FLOPs增加约1.2G（相对于YOLO11s基线），推理延迟增加<15ms（在T4 GPU上测量）。
modules.failure_mode: MSFAM在极端小目标（<5像素）或严重模糊场景下可能失效，导致召回率下降。此外，若自适应注意力权重分配不当，可能引入噪声特征，影响整体精度。
modules.input_semantics: 输入为YOLO11s骨干网络输出的多尺度特征图（P3、P4、P5），分辨率分别为80×80、40×40、20×20，通道数为[256, 512, 1024]。
modules.input_shape: task-specific representation at the selected insertion point; exact dimensions are resolved after the baseline is frozen

modules.original_role: YOLO11s中的特征融合层（FSPPF）与上采样模块
modules.output_semantics: 输出为融合后的多尺度特征图，与输入维度一致，用于后续检测头的目标预测。
modules.output_shape: representation contract required by the downstream baseline stage

proposed: 遥感图像中密集小目标检测的核心挑战在于目标尺寸小、分布密集且背景复杂（如云层、阴影、水体纹理），导致现有通用目标检测方法（如YOLO、Faster R-CNN）在漏检率与定位精度上存在显著不足。基于已验证的局部卷积特征与VLAD聚合方法在检索任务中的有效性（VF001），可推测其在特征表征能力上具备潜在优势，但需针对检测任务进行适配性改进。

Under 目标检测任务的评估协议（包括数据集划分、评估指标与失败模式定义）已冻结且独立于训练过程。, 在VLAD聚合后集成一个轻量级空间注意力模块，该模块通过学习背景干扰模式的权重分布，动态调整特征图的响应强度，以提升目标检测的精度与召回率。 should 预期在目标检测任务中，mAP（mean Average Precision）提升约2-4%，漏检率降低15-25%，计算效率提升约30%（基于VF003的轻量化策略）。 because 局部卷积特征通过多尺度卷积核捕获不同尺寸目标的特征，VLAD聚合将局部特征映射为全局描述子以增强鲁棒性。空间注意力模块通过学习背景干扰模式（如云层、阴影）的权重分布，抑制非目标区域的特征响应。 addresses 方法假设局部卷积特征在检测任务中的表征能力可直接迁移，但未考虑遥感图像中目标密集分布导致的特征重叠问题。此外，轻量化特征降维策略可能损失部分细粒度特征，影响极小目标的检测性能。, while 设置目标尺寸阈值（如面积小于16像素）作为检测失败模式的触发条件，并记录对应的背景干扰类型（如云层、阴影）以指导后续数据增强策略。.

proposed: 低光照环境下行人检测的核心挑战在于单一模态（如可见光）信号微弱，而多模态融合（如可见光+热红外）虽能提升检测性能，但现有方法未明确在保证精度的同时如何优化推理速度。现有证据表明，Faster R-CNN的RPN在行人检测中表现优异，但分类器因特征图分辨率不足和缺乏困难样本挖掘而导致性能下降。此外，光照条件与检测置信度存在相关性，为自适应融合策略提供了理论依据。

Under 低光照环境（夜间、弱光或逆光）下的行人检测任务，且需要在精度与推理速度之间进行权衡。, 在Faster R-CNN的RPN之后集成LightSpeedFusion模块，该模块通过一个轻量级光照强度估计器动态调节多模态特征融合权重，在保证检测精度的同时优化推理速度。 should 在低光照场景下，LightSpeedFusion预期能在保持或提升检测精度（如MR⁻²或AP）的同时，将推理速度提升15-25%（相对于未优化的Faster R-CNN）。在非低光照场景下，预期推理速度提升30-40%，精度损失在可接受范围内（<2%）。 because 光照强度估计器通过输入图像的亮度直方图和对比度特征计算光照分数，并基于该分数动态调节可见光与热红外特征的融合权重。在低光照条件下（光照分数低于阈值），模块激活高分辨率特征图处理以提升检测精度；否则使用低分辨率特征图以提升推理速度。 addresses LightSpeedFusion模块依赖光照强度估计器的准确性，在极端或快速变化的光照条件下可能导致融合权重不稳定。此外，模块仅在Faster R-CNN架构下验证，通用性有待进一步测试。, while LightSpeedFusion模块的光照阈值需通过预实验确定，确保在低光照条件下精度不下降超过1%。同时，模块需支持硬件加速（如TensorRT）以确保推理速度提升的可实现性。.

verified: Multispectral (color-thermal) pedestrian detection outperforms single-modality methods under challenging illumination conditions.

Faster R-CNN's Region Proposal Network (RPN) can serve as a strong stand-alone pedestrian detector, but its downstream classifier may degrade performance due to insufficient feature map resolution and lack of hard negative mining.
An Illumination-aware Faster R-CNN (IAF R-CNN) improves pedestrian detection by adaptively merging color and thermal sub-networks based on an illumination measure.
Pedestrian detection confidences from color or thermal images are correlated with illumination conditions, enabling adaptive fusion strategies.

hypothesis.condition: 低光照环境（夜间、弱光或逆光）下的行人检测任务，且需要在精度与推理速度之间进行权衡。
hypothesis.guardrail: LightSpeedFusion模块的光照阈值需通过预实验确定，确保在低光照条件下精度不下降超过1%。同时，模块需支持硬件加速（如TensorRT）以确保推理速度提升的可实现性。
hypothesis.intervention: 在Faster R-CNN的RPN之后集成LightSpeedFusion模块，该模块通过一个轻量级光照强度估计器动态调节多模态特征融合权重，在保证检测精度的同时优化推理速度。
hypothesis.limitation: LightSpeedFusion模块依赖光照强度估计器的准确性，在极端或快速变化的光照条件下可能导致融合权重不稳定。此外，模块仅在Faster R-CNN架构下验证，通用性有待进一步测试。
hypothesis.mechanism: 光照强度估计器通过输入图像的亮度直方图和对比度特征计算光照分数，并基于该分数动态调节可见光与热红外特征的融合权重。在低光照条件下（光照分数低于阈值），模块激活高分辨率特征图处理以提升检测精度；否则使用低分辨率特征图以提升推理速度。
hypothesis.target_metric: 在低光照场景下，LightSpeedFusion预期能在保持或提升检测精度（如MR⁻²或AP）的同时，将推理速度提升15-25%（相对于未优化的Faster R-CNN）。在非低光照场景下，预期推理速度提升30-40%，精度损失在可接受范围内（<2%）。

modules.compute_cost: LightSpeedFusion模块的计算开销主要来自光照强度估计器和动态融合权重计算，预计增加约5-10%的FLOPs。但在低光照条件下，通过减少高分辨率特征图处理的频率，整体推理速度仍有提升。
modules.failure_mode: 光照估计器在极端光照条件下（如强光或快速变化光照）可能误判光照分数，导致融合权重不当，进而影响检测精度。此外，高分辨率特征图处理在硬件资源受限时可能无法达到预期的速度提升。
modules.input_semantics: 输入为可见光图像和热红外图像的配对，以及对应的光照强度分数（由LightSpeedFusion的光照估计器计算）。

State-of-the-art HAR systems achieve real-time or near real-time performance on commodity hardware (e.g., notebooks with NVIDIA GPUs) or mobile devices.

Pose-based HAR methods (e.g., AcT) can achieve low-latency real-time performance by leveraging 2D pose representations over small temporal windows.
3D HAR systems (e.g., SequentialPointNet) can achieve competitive accuracy with up to 10x faster inference than prior methods by simplifying point cloud sequence modeling.

proposed: Current multimodal medical image fusion methods are predominantly optimized for segmentation tasks, leaving classification-focused fusion strategies under-explored. The verified evidence demonstrates effective multimodal fusion in segmentation contexts but does not provide explicit task formulations, benchmarks, or performance metrics for classification tasks. This creates a gap in understanding how fusion strategies designed for segmentation can be adapted or evaluated for classification performance.

Under The intervention assumes the availability of a frozen 2D pre-trained encoder and a matched multimodal dataset with classification labels. The baseline must be a unimodal classification model trained on the same dataset., Replace the segmentation decoder in the existing architecture with a lightweight classification head (e.g., a single fully connected layer or a small MLP) while keeping the 2D pre-trained encoder and fusion layers intact. Train the classification head on the target multimodal dataset using standard classification loss (e.g., cross-entropy). should Expected improvement in classification accuracy (e.g., F1-score or AUC) compared to unimodal baselines, assuming the fusion strategy effectively combines complementary information from multimodal inputs. The magnitude of improvement depends on the relevance and quality of the fused modalities. because The weight-transfer mechanism leverages a 2D pre-trained encoder (e.g., from natural image classification) embedded into a higher-dimensional fusion architecture. By replacing the segmentation decoder with a classification head, the encoder's learned features are repurposed to extract fused representations optimized for classification tasks. addresses The proposed intervention does not address modality-specific preprocessing or alignment challenges, which may require additional domain-specific modules. Classification performance may degrade if the fusion strategy introduces noise or irrelevant features from non-informative modalities., while Ensure the classification head is minimal to avoid overfitting, particularly when training data is limited. verified: The paper demonstrates effective multimodal medical image fusion and segmentation across MR, CT, and ultrasound modalities using deep learning.

The proposed architectures include weight transfer (embedding a 2D pre-trained encoder into a higher dimensional U-Net) and dimensional transfer (expanding a 2D segmentation network into a higher dimension).
The methods achieved state-of-the-art or competitive results on benchmarks such as CAMUS (echo-cardiographic data), CHAOS (MR and CT abdominal images), and BraTS 2022 (brain tumor segmentation).
The paper reports Dice scores of 91.69% (whole tumor), 83.23% (tumor core), and 81.75% (enhanced tumor) for the BraTS 2022 competition using the proposed methods.

hypothesis.condition: The intervention assumes the availability of a frozen 2D pre-trained encoder and a matched multimodal dataset with classification labels. The baseline must be a unimodal classification model trained on the same dataset.
hypothesis.guardrail: Ensure the classification head is minimal to avoid overfitting, particularly when training data is limited. Monitor modality-specific feature contributions to prevent the fusion strategy from amplifying noise or irrelevant features.
hypothesis.intervention: Replace the segmentation decoder in the existing architecture with a lightweight classification head (e.g., a single fully connected layer or a small MLP) while keeping the 2D pre-trained encoder and fusion layers intact. Train the classification head on the target multimodal dataset using standard classification loss (e.g., cross-entropy).
hypothesis.limitation: The proposed intervention does not address modality-specific preprocessing or alignment challenges, which may require additional domain-specific modules. Classification performance may degrade if the fusion strategy introduces noise or irrelevant features from non-informative modalities.
hypothesis.mechanism: The weight-transfer mechanism leverages a 2D pre-trained encoder (e.g., from natural image classification) embedded into a higher-dimensional fusion architecture. By replacing the segmentation decoder with a classification head, the encoder's learned features are repurposed to extract fused representations optimized for classification tasks.
hypothesis.target_metric: Expected improvement in classification accuracy (e.g., F1-score or AUC) compared to unimodal baselines, assuming the fusion strategy effectively combines complementary information from multimodal inputs. The magnitude of improvement depends on the relevance and quality of the fused modalities.
